steps.t: You should talk to Easterling refugees in Dale and learn the truth of the rumours.
You should look for sign of the missing refugees, south from Dale's eastern gates, and defeat any Jangovar that may have been involved in their disapp…
Tay Yoldash can be found south-east of the city of Dale in the Dale-lands. You should defeat Jangovar and free refugees from Tay Yoldash.
You should return to Orphón with news of your success, just outside Tay Yoldash.
